evals.prompt: Create a new React Native sheet that belongs only in apps/mobile and has no shared DOM counterpart.
evals.expected_output: Use mobile-component-scaffold, choose the mobile-only branch, keep props local to apps/mobile, use StyleSheet.create with @salmon/shared tokens, and update the mobile barrel exports.

evals.prompt: Implement the React Native side of a component that should share the same semantic contract with web and extension.
evals.expected_output: Use mobile-component-scaffold, choose the cross-platform branch, extend the shared PropsBase contract locally with ViewStyle, keep the RN implementation in apps/mobile, and update mobile exports.

evals.prompt: Add a new user-facing warning string to the send flow and wire it without hardcoded strings.
evals.expected_output: Do not use mobile-component-scaffold for this task unless the request explicitly includes apps/mobile or React Native component work; prefer the translation skill instead.
